accurate.why: All claims match the bill text on the LEU import ban, waiver, and termination dates.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; details track the USEC Privatization Act amendment.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the ban on Russian unirradiated low-enriched uranium imports.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the ban amends import rules though does not name USEC Act; still describes the change in law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the DOE waiver conditions; omits minor DOE/isotope carve-out but captures key exception.

effective_dates.why: Notes Jan 1 2028 waiver termination and Dec 31 2040 ban sunset.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures prohibition, waiver, and sunset; the essential operative effect.

correct_entities.why: DOE, Secretaries of Energy/State/Commerce, and committees named correctly.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
